title: antilla alpestris
intro: Antilla alpestris, also known as the mountain antilla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Antilla alpestris include reducing fever, soothing digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Antilla alpestris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
